summary: The customer reported a suspicious charge on their account and the agent promptly resolved the issue by blocking the card and initiating a dispute. The customer was satisfied with the outcome.
resolution: Offer additional services to prevent similar issues in the future

empathy_phrases_used: I completely understand how alarming that feels
I am really glad you called right away

model_metrics.notes: Model performed well in identifying key aspects of the call

improvements.suggestion: Offer additional services to prevent similar issues in the future
improvements.example: I can also offer you our identity theft protection service to help prevent similar issues in the future

improvements.suggestion: Provide customers with information on how to prevent suspicious charges
improvements.example: To prevent similar issues in the future, I recommend regularly monitoring your account activity and reporting any suspicious transactions immediately

highlights: The agent promptly resolved the issue by blocking the card and initiating a dispute
The agent showed empathy and understanding towards the customer's concerns
The agent provided a clear explanation of the resolution process and the expected outcome
